appliedUpdates.description: Clarified that OAuth redirect_uri issue only affects 127.0.0.1:8080, not localhost:8080. The preset controls are in a modal that can be accessed via JavaScript for testing when normal auth flow is unavailable.

flowReports.notes: API contract assertions validated in round 1

All UI selection assertions passed. Testing used http://localhost:8080 (not 127.0.0.1:8080) which resolved the OAuth redirect_uri issue. The preset controls exist in a hidden modal that was accessed via JavaScript injection for testing.
